headline: Hedge-Fund Managers Are Minting Money Off This AI Trade
summary: Bank of America’s stock-trading team summed up recent moves in AI this way in a February note to clients: “Semis > Software has been the YTD (and frankly 2025) trade.”  Analog Century Management, a hedge-fund firm run by physicist Val Zlatev: Its main hedge fund is up about 17% this year through February, people familiar with the matter said.  Positions in semiconductor capital equipment stocks such as Applied Materials and memory-chip makers such as Micron Technology did well.

content.title: Hedge-Fund Managers Are Minting Money Off This AI Trade
content.summary: Bank of America’s stock-trading team summed up recent moves in AI this way in a February note to clients: “Semis > Software has been the YTD (and frankly 2025) trade.”  Analog Century Management, a hedge-fund firm run by physicist Val Zlatev: Its main hedge fund is up about 17% this year through February, people familiar with the matter said.  Positions in semiconductor capital equipment stocks such as Applied Materials and memory-chip makers such as Micron Technology did well.

headline: Micron Technology price target boosted on stronger-than-expected memory pricing
summary: Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ:MU) saw its price target raised to $500 by Wedbush analysts, who cited memory industry pricing trends as the main driver behind the upgrade. The analysts also reiterated their ‘Outperform’ rating on the stock, which traded hands at about $422 on Friday...
